Notice Of Petition In Support Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action; **First Appearance Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Melissa Rinehart, Esq. 213-465-4802 KIng & Siegel for Plaintiff.
Poline Pourmorady, Esq. 619-744-2204 Duane Morris for Defendant.
Court reporter: Elizabeth Magana, CSR #13533, 661-361-0296, emaganacsr@yahoo.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Ms. Pourmorady contests and presents arguments. The Court comments and poses questions. Ms. Rinehart responds to arguments. Ms. Pourmorady presents brief rebuttal.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Zendesk, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration.

Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
